tasks.subject: Task 1: Security primitives — CodeField, ConfirmDialog, TotpQr (+ qrcode)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** CodeField (copy) + ConfirmDialog (destructive confirm, Cancel initial focus, close=cancel) + TotpQr (qrcode toDataURL -> data: img + alt) + qrcode/@types/qrcode dep + i18n(common.copy/copied, confirm.cancel) + tests.

```json:metadata
{"files":["dashboard/src/components/custom/CodeField.vue","dashboard/src/components/custom/ConfirmDialog.vue","dashboard/src/components/custom/TotpQr.vue","dashboard/package.json","dashboard/src/locales/en.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd dashboard && mise exec -- npm run test","acceptanceCriteria":["CodeField copies via clipboard","ConfirmDialog destructive confirm + Cancel initial focus; close=cancel","TotpQr renders data: img with alt; nothing on failure","tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: RecoveryCodesDisplay
tasks.description:

tasks.subject: Task 3: PasskeysCard
tasks.description:
**Goal:** list /me/credentials (fallback name + backup StatusBadge + truncate); add (register/begin->useWebauthn.register->complete?nickname); rename; delete via ConfirmDialog; surface errors.last_passkey. Session-only (no withSudo). + i18n(security.passkeys, errors.last_passkey) + tests.

```json:metadata
{"files":["dashboard/src/pages/security/PasskeysCard.vue","dashboard/src/locales/en.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd dashboard && mise exec -- npm run test","acceptanceCriteria":["list w/ fallback name + backup badge + truncate","add begin->register->complete reload","delete confirm posts {id}; last_passkey error renders"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: PasswordCard
tasks.description:
**Goal:** new+confirm password; client 8-1024 + match; submit -> withSudo(POST /me/password/set {password}); success. + i18n(security.password) + tests (mock @/lib/sudo so withSudo runs fn).

tasks.subject: Task 5: TotpCard
tasks.description:
**Goal:** setup -> withSudo(begin) -> TotpQr(otpauth)+CodeField(secret)+code input -> withSudo(verify {code}); first enroll recovery_codes -> RecoveryCodesDisplay. + i18n(security.totp) + tests (mock @/lib/sudo, qrcode).

tasks.subject: Task 6: RecoveryCodesCard + SecurityView + route + nav + revoke
tasks.description:
**Goal:** RecoveryCodesCard (regenerate -> RecoveryCodesDisplay regenerated; bad_request->needTotp hint); SecurityView stacks 4 cards + bottom ConfirmDialog revoke -> withSudo(revoke-password-totp); /security child route (requiresAuth) + AppSidebar nav.security link (KeyRound). + i18n(security.recovery, security.revoke, nav.security) + tests.

{"files":["dashboard/src/pages/security/RecoveryCodesCard.vue","dashboard/src/pages/SecurityView.vue","dashboard/src/router/index.ts","dashboard/src/components/custom/AppSidebar.vue","dashboard/src/locales/en.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd dashboard && mise exec -- npm run test && mise exec -- npm run build","acceptanceCriteria":["regenerate->display; bad_request->needTotp hint","SecurityView 4 cards + revoke confirm->revoke-password-totp","/security requiresAuth route + nav.security link"]}
